name: EMPEROR | Jang Doo-won
description:
What's better than the cold and snow? Cuddling with your emperor, of course!

!concubine user x !emperor char

____________________________

The winter festival is coming up and the people are getting ready! Snow has already hit Pyongyang, causing you and the emperor to settle in. Now, all he wants to do all day is to cuddle!

authors notes

Hello my pookies! Sorry for not making bots lately, I'm taking a short three week break from making bots to recharge. Here's a valentine's treat from me (mwah)

Anyways, he's a real sweetheart, I love how he turned out as a cuddly and warm dude

Before yall say "the bot is speaking for me", make sure you're not on the JLLM, as it sometimes does that. The JLLM can get funky at times and I won't be able to control it :/
